chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 342 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.1713/2025. 2. For orders on CMA No.1714/2025. 3. For orders on CMA No.1715/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 27.01.2025 Mr. Muhammad Irfan Asif, advocate for the petitioners. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3&4. Primary prayer in this petition is seeking to set aside the impugned assessment order. Prima facie, same falls within hierarchy domain of customs Act, 1969. In view hereof, petition is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
